data.title: Quidelortho Faces Material Risk from Weak Internal Controls and Sarbanes–Oxley Compliance Challenges
data.description:
Quidelortho Corporation (QDEL) has disclosed a new risk, in the Accounting & Financial Operations category.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Quidelortho Corporation faces a material risk if it fails to establish and sustain robust internal controls over financial reporting and fraud prevention. Persistent weaknesses or control failures could impair the reliability of its disclosures, damaging its reputation and undermining investor confidence in its financial statements and governance.

Such control deficiencies could also complicate compliance with Section 404 of the Sarbanes–Oxley Act of 2002 and other regulatory requirements. In turn, these issues may pressure operating performance and are likely to depress the trading price of its common stock as market participants reprice the company’s risk profile.
